requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B Plugs (ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——110–120V / 60Hz / A/B型插头（ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——110–120V / 60Hz / A/B型插頭（ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Colombia operates at 110–120 V / 60 Hz with Type A (ungrounded two-blade) and Type B (grounded three-pin) plugs — the same voltage, frequency, and plug type as the United States and Canada. This is a critical distinction from most South American countries (which typically use 220 V / 50 Hz), and means that Chinese exporters who have already adapted products for the US market have a hardware grid-compatibility advantage for Colombia. Electrical safety certification in Colombia follows ICONTEC NTC standards, which adopt IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment safety) as the primary standard for multimedia, IT, and connected consumer devices. Power adapters and chargers for wireless and IoT devices sold in Colombia must comply with applicable NTC safety standards. Depending on product category, ICONTEC or SIC (Superintendencia de Industria y Comercio) may enforce compulsory electrical safety certification. Evidence of electrical safety compliance may also be required within the CRC homologación technical dossier.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚采用110–120V/60Hz、A型（未接地双刀片）和B型（接地三脚）插头，与美国和加拿大的电压、频率和插头类型相同。这与大多数南美国家（通常使用220V/50Hz）有重要区别，意味着已针对美国市场适配产品的中国出口商在哥伦比亚具备硬件电网兼容性优势。哥伦比亚的电气安全认证遵循ICONTEC NTC标准，该标准采用IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全）作为多媒体、IT和联网消费设备的主要标准。在哥伦比亚销售的无线和物联网设备电源适配器和充电器须符合适用NTC安全标准。视产品类别，ICONTEC或SIC（工业商业监督局）可能执行强制性电气安全认证。CRC型式认可技术文件内也可能需要提供电气安全合规证明。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞採用110–120V/60Hz、A型（未接地雙刀片）和B型（接地三腳）插頭，與美國和加拿大的電壓、頻率和插頭類型相同。這與大多數南美國家（通常使用220V/50Hz）有重要區別，意味著已針對美國市場適配產品的中國出口商在哥倫比亞具備硬件電網相容性優勢。哥倫比亞的電氣安全認證遵循ICONTEC NTC標準，該標準採用IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊和通信技術設備安全）作為多媒體、IT和聯網消費裝置的主要標準。在哥倫比亞銷售的無線和物聯網裝置電源適配器和充電器須符合適用NTC安全標準。視產品類別，ICONTEC或SIC（工業商業監督局）可能執行強制性電氣安全認證。CRC型式認可技術文件內也可能需要提供電氣安全合規證明。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC equivalent of IEC 62368-1 — electrical safety standard for audio/video, IT and communications technology equipment in Colombia
Colombia 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B — mains voltage, frequency, and plug standard; same as US/Canada, distinct from most South American markets
IEC 62368-1 — international safety standard for audio/video, IT and communications equipment (adopted via ICONTEC NTC harmonisation)
CRC homologación technical dossier — electrical safety evidence may be required depending on product category

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for information and communication technology equipment is governed by GB 4943.1, which is aligned with IEC 62368-1 (transitioning from the former IEC 60950-1 basis). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) requires testing and factory inspection to GB 4943.1 for in-scope products. China operates at 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A, C, and I plugs — a substantially different voltage and frequency from Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz system. Products designed exclusively for China's 220 V grid require power supply adaptation (e.g., universal 100–240 V SMPS) for Colombian use. Chinese CCC safety certificates based on GB 4943.1 are not recognised by ICONTEC or SIC in Colombia.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息和通信技术设备的电气安全由GB 4943.1规范，与IEC 62368-1对齐（从原IEC 60950-1基础过渡而来）。CCC（中国强制认证）要求对范围内产品按GB 4943.1进行检测和工厂检查。中国采用220V/50Hz、A/C/I型插头——与哥伦比亚110–120V/60Hz系统在电压和频率上有显著差异。专为中国220V电网设计的产品在哥伦比亚使用时须进行电源适配（如通用100–240V开关电源）。基于GB 4943.1的中国CCC安全证书不被哥伦比亚ICONTEC或SIC承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊和通信技術設備的電氣安全由GB 4943.1規範，與IEC 62368-1對齊（從原IEC 60950-1基礎過渡而來）。CCC（中國強制認證）要求對範圍內產品按GB 4943.1進行檢測和工廠檢查。中國採用220V/50Hz、A/C/I型插頭——與哥倫比亞110–120V/60Hz系統在電壓和頻率上有顯著差異。專為中國220V電網設計的產品在哥倫比亞使用時須進行電源適配（如通用100–240V開關電源）。基於GB 4943.1的中國CCC安全證書不被哥倫比亞ICONTEC或SIC承認。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — China electrical safety standard for IT/ICT equipment (aligned with IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory for in-scope electrical and IT products sold in China
China 220 V / 50 Hz / Type A/C/I — differs substantially from Colombia's 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B system

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates based on GB 4943.1 are not recognised in Colombia. ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 safety compliance evidence is required for the Colombian market, either as part of the CRC homologación dossier or under any applicable ICONTEC compulsory certification scheme. The critical hardware gap is voltage and frequency: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz, while Colombia uses 110–120 V / 60 Hz. Products with a universal 100–240 V / 50–60 Hz SMPS power supply (common in US-spec or global-spec products) are already hardware-compatible with Colombia's grid — a significant advantage for Chinese exporters who have adapted to the US market. Products with China-only 220 V power supplies require redesign or a new power adapter. A separate ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 safety test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required regardless of any existing CCC or CE safety documentation.
gap.zh: 基于GB 4943.1的中国CCC电气安全证书在哥伦比亚不被认可。哥伦比亚市场需要ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全合规证明，既可作为CRC型式认可文件的一部分，也可通过适用的ICONTEC强制认证方案获取。关键硬件差距在于电压和频率：中国使用220V/50Hz，而哥伦比亚使用110–120V/60Hz。配备通用100–240V/50–60Hz开关电源（常见于美规或全球规格产品）的产品已与哥伦比亚电网硬件兼容——对已适配美国市场的中国出口商具有显著优势。仅配备中国220V电源的产品须进行重新设计或更换电源适配器。无论现有CCC或CE安全文件如何，均须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的独立ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全检测报告。
gap.zht: 基於GB 4943.1的中國CCC電氣安全證書在哥倫比亞不被認可。哥倫比亞市場需要ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全合規證明，既可作為CRC型式認可文件的一部分，也可通過適用的ICONTEC強制認證方案獲取。關鍵硬件差距在於電壓和頻率：中國使用220V/50Hz，而哥倫比亞使用110–120V/60Hz。配備通用100–240V/50–60Hz開關電源（常見於美規或全球規格產品）的產品已與哥倫比亞電網硬件相容——對已適配美國市場的中國出口商具有顯著優勢。僅配備中國220V電源的產品須進行重新設計或更換電源適配器。無論現有CCC或CE安全文件如何，均須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的獨立ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全檢測報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 electrical safety compliance required; 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B hardware compatibility required for sale in Colombia; CCC not recognised
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC based on GB 4943.1 required for in-scope electrical and IT products sold in China at 220 V / 50 Hz

source.publisher: ICONTEC — Instituto Colombiano de Normas Técnicas y Certificación

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia uses 110–120 V / 60 Hz / Type A/B (US/Canada-compatible) — Chinese exporters with universal-voltage or US-spec hardware have a grid-compatibility advantage. However, Chinese CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised in Colombia. ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1 safety test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required. Verify current ICONTEC compulsory certification scope for your product category and CRC dossier electrical safety requirements with a qualified Colombian regulatory professional before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚采用110–120V/60Hz/A/B型插头（美国/加拿大兼容）——持有通用电压或美规硬件的中国出口商具备电网兼容优势。但中国CCC电气安全证书在哥伦比亚不被认可。须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全检测证明。进口前请向合格的哥伦比亚监管专业人士核验您产品类别的现行ICONTEC强制认证范围和CRC文件电气安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞採用110–120V/60Hz/A/B型插頭（美國/加拿大相容）——持有通用電壓或美規硬件的中國出口商具備電網相容優勢。但中國CCC電氣安全證書在哥倫比亞不被認可。須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的ICONTEC NTC / IEC 62368-1安全檢測證明。進口前請向合格的哥倫比亞監管專業人士核驗您產品類別的現行ICONTEC強制認證範圍和CRC文件電氣安全要求。
